rationale: Bug: FindOptions.CodingKeys omitted readConcern, so readConcern was never encoded/sent; spec requires it.
Internal API refactor to nest BSON subtype inside Binary; no spec rule violated.
Internal Swift CustomStringConvertible consistency between ReadConcern and WriteConcern; no spec rule.
API ergonomics: remove Document(Dictionary) initializer to avoid key-ordering issues; no spec rule.
BSON spec requires Int encode as Int32 or Int64 by value; driver errors on valid 64-bit Swift Int values.
Build/packaging failure: swift build fails to download pinned dependencies; no spec involvement.
Internal refactor to hide bson_t behind a Swift wrapper class; no spec behavior change.
CRUD spec requires distinct() return Iterable<any>; driver returns synthetic cursor instead of [BsonValue?].
Swiftlint rule cleanup; CI/code quality, no spec involvement.
Internal refactor: hide bson_iter_t behind DocumentIterator wrapper; no spec behavior change.
Improvement to validate UUID subtype data is 16 bytes; no specific spec rule mandates this validation.
CRUD spec result types should allow null inserted IDs; driver's InsertOneResult/InsertManyResult disallow nulls.
Packaging/distribution issue: driver not found in CocoaPods or Swift Package Manager; no spec involvement.
Implements server-version filtering for YAML/JSON spec tests; purely test runner infrastructure.
Adds buildInfo command to retrieve server version for spec test filtering; test infrastructure support.
API ergonomics: add map/filter/reduce-like operations on Document; no spec rule involved.
Input validation improvement for Decimal128 constructor; no specific BSON spec rule requires this check.
Swift Collection protocol conformance ergonomics for Document; no spec rule involved.
Driver claims to return nil for unacknowledged writes but never checks write concern; spec defines this behavior.
Internal BSON document key-overwrite implementation detail; no spec rule about Document API duplicate-key handling.
Logic inversion in Document.isEmpty internal method; not a spec-defined behavior.
Rename Bson to BSON for naming convention; pure API ergonomics, no spec rule.
Internal refactor to use optimized Document methods (hasKey, isEmpty, count); no spec behavior change.
Build/packaging: update Cocoapods recipe to use mobile SDK frameworks; no spec involvement.
CI configuration fix: make Travis fail on swiftlint warnings; build infrastructure only.
CI tooling: install newer swiftlint via brew on Travis; no spec involvement.
Build compatibility issue with Swift 4.2; C name import failure, no spec behavior involved.
API ergonomics: add BSONValue equality comparison method; no spec rule requires this.
Documentation: broken README link fix; no spec involvement.
Internal refactor to use throwing setValue internally; no spec behavior change.
Internal optimization: use libmongoc 1.13 in-place overwrite for ObjectId/Timestamp/Datetime; no spec behavior change.
Internal API: add throwing getValue method to reduce fatal errors; no spec behavior change.
Test configuration: accept port from command line instead of hardcoding; internal test improvement.
Test code organization: create MongoTestCase base class for functional tests; no spec runner change.
Swift Collection protocol conformance for Document; API ergonomics, no spec rule.
CI tooling: integrate xcpretty for prettier test output; no spec involvement.
Internal organization: move benchmarks to a separate project; no spec involvement.
Internal refactor: move Document.filter to its own extension to silence compiler warning; no spec behavior change.
Language compatibility: fix UnsafeMutableRawPointer deprecation warnings in Swift 4.1+; no spec involvement.
Language compatibility: fix deallocate deprecation warnings in Swift 4.1+; no spec involvement.
API surface reduction: internalize Document.merge; unsafe-for-users method made internal; no spec rule.
API design: improve null vs missing key distinction in Document; no spec rule about Document API null handling.
ObjectId spec says drivers SHOULD expose timestamp accessor; driver was missing this required accessor.
BSON datetime is int64 milliseconds; driver truncates instead of rounding, losing sub-millisecond precision.
Test code refactor: replace manual cast assertions with bsonEqual Nimble matcher; no spec runner change.
Internal code organization: move Document protocol conformances to extensions; no spec behavior change.
Internal code organization: move private/internal Document methods to extension; no spec behavior change.
Test code: centralize hardcoded test database name in base class; no spec runner change.
Swift 4.2 @dynamicMemberLookup on Document for dot-notation access; API ergonomics, no spec rule.
Packaging: update podspecs to use platform-provided frameworks; duplicate of SWIFT-205, no spec involvement.
